name: explorer-frontend
description: Bitcoin Cash Explorer mempool visualizer and blockchain explorer frontend
author: Melroy van den Berg <melroy@melroy.org> (https://melroy.org)

scripts.serve: pnpm run generate-config && ng serve --no-hmr -c local
scripts.serve:nl: pnpm run generate-config && ng serve --no-hmr -c nl
scripts.serve:es: pnpm run generate-config && ng serve --no-hmr -c es
scripts.serve:ro: pnpm run generate-config && ng serve --no-hmr -c ro
scripts.serve:pt: pnpm run generate-config && ng serve --no-hmr -c pt
scripts.serve:zh-Hant: pnpm run generate-config && ng serve --no-hmr -c zh-Hant
scripts.serve:zh-Hans: pnpm run generate-config && ng serve --no-hmr -c zh-Hans
scripts.serve:local-prod: pnpm run generate-config && ng serve --no-hmr -c local-prod
scripts.serve:parameterized: pnpm run generate-config && ng serve --no-hmr -c parameterized
scripts.start: pnpm run generate-config && pnpm run sync-assets-dev && ng serve --no-hmr -c local
scripts.start:parameterized: pnpm run generate-config && pnpm run sync-assets-dev && ng serve --no-hmr -c parameterized
scripts.start:local-prod: pnpm run generate-config && pnpm run sync-assets-dev && ng serve --no-hmr -c local-prod
scripts.start:mixed: pnpm run generate-config && pnpm run sync-assets-dev &&ng serve --no-hmr -c mixed
scripts.build: pnpm run generate-config && ng build && pnpm run sync-assets-dev && pnpm run sync-assets
scripts.watch: pnpm run generate-config && ng build --watch --configuration development
scripts.config:defaults:explorer: node update-config.js TESTNET4_ENABLED=false SCALENET_ENABLED=false CHIPNET_ENABLED=false ITEMS_PER_PAGE=25 BASE_MODULE=explorer MIN_BLOCK_SIZE_UNITS=32000000 BCMR_API=https://bcmr.flowee.cash && pnpm run generate-config
scripts.cypress:open:ci: node update-config.js TESTNET4_ENABLED=true SCALENET_ENABLED=true CHIPNET_ENABLED=true ITEMS_PER_PAGE=25 && pnpm run generate-config && start-server-and-test serve:local-prod 4200 cypress:open
scripts.cypress:run:ci: node update-config.js TESTNET4_ENABLED=true SCALENET_ENABLED=true CHIPNET_ENABLED=true ITEMS_PER_PAGE=25 && pnpm run generate-config && start-server-and-test serve:local-prod 4200 cypress:run:record
scripts.cypress:open:ci:parameterized: node update-config.js TESTNET4_ENABLED=true SCALENET_ENABLED=true CHIPNET_ENABLED=true ITEMS_PER_PAGE=25 && pnpm run generate-config && start-server-and-test serve:parameterized 4200 cypress:open
scripts.cypress:run:ci:parameterized: node update-config.js TESTNET4_ENABLED=true SCALENET_ENABLED=true CHIPNET_ENABLED=true ITEMS_PER_PAGE=25 && pnpm run generate-config && start-server-and-test serve:parameterized 4200 cypress:run:record
